/CAL:SENTENCING TO OPEN PLEA TO THE COURT/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENSE MOTION TOSTRIKE CIRCUMSTANCES IN AGGRAVATION #1 & #6 FROM THE PRE-SENTENCE REPORT IS GRANTED/X:THIS IS A SERIOUS & VIOLENT CRIME & CONSIDERED A STRIKE CONVICTION; DEFENDANT IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H),/AJW//X:SENTENCE ON COUNT ONE: TWO (2) YEARS STATE PRISON, LOW TERM,/X:ENHANCEMENT ON COUNT ONE, PURSUANT TO PC 667(A)(1): FIVE (5) YEARS  STATE PRISON,//X:TOTAL: SEVEN (7) YEARS, STATE PRISON,/CH1:SP 2 Y:L:ESS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1 Y/CTWP:317/CTORD:THAT WHILE THE DEFENDANT IS ON PROBATION, HE IS ELIGIBLE FORHALF-TIME CREDITS PER PC 4019; IF PROBATION GETS REVOKED, HE WILL NOT BE ELIGIBLE FOR HALF-TIME CREDITS/ENH:CH1:TYPE 667(A)(1)PC:TI5Y:CS/CTORD:THATTHE ONE-YEAR COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE MUST BE SERVED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM & FAILURE TO COMPLETE THE SAID PROGRAM WILL RESULT IN LOSS OF ALLCREDITS ACCUMULATED/WS/DNACOMP/STATES/SA1:150 YARDS FROM ERIC CHULIM/SAORD/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY RESTITUTION TO THE VICTIM, TO BE MONITORED BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT, PLUS 15% ADMINISTRATIVE FEES/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANTS, JERELL HENDERSON (COURT #14004128) & JOHN  LACAP (COURT #14004132), ARE JOINTLY & SEVERALLY RESPONSIBLE FOR THE AMOUNT OF RESTITUTION IN THE SUM OF $1630,24; ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION FILED IN COURT,/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/

docket_entries.docketEntryComment: /CAL:SENTENCING TO OPEN PLEA TO THE COURT/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENSE MOTION TOSTRIKE CIRCUMSTANCES IN AGGRAVATION #1 & #6 FROM THE PRE-SENTENCE REPORT IS GRANTED/X:THIS IS A SERIOUS & VIOLENT CRIME & CONSIDERED A STRIKE CONVICTION; DEFENDANT IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H),/AJW//X:SENTENCE ON COUNT ONE: TWO (2) YEARS STATE PRISON, LOW TERM,/X:ENHANCEMENT ON COUNT ONE, PURSUANT TO PC 667(A)(1): FIVE (5) YEARS  STATE PRISON,//X:TOTAL: SEVEN (7) YEARS, STATE PRISON,/CH1:SP 2 Y:L:ESS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1 Y/CTWP:317/CTORD:THAT WHILE THE DEFENDANT IS ON PROBATION, HE IS ELIGIBLE FORHALF-TIME CREDITS PER PC 4019; IF PROBATION GETS REVOKED, HE WILL NOT BE ELIGIBLE FOR HALF-TIME CREDITS/ENH:CH1:TYPE 667(A)(1)PC:TI5Y:CS/CTORD:THATTHE ONE-YEAR COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE MUST BE SERVED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM & FAILURE TO COMPLETE THE SAID PROGRAM WILL RESULT IN LOSS OF ALLCREDITS ACCUMULATED/WS/DNACOMP/STATES/SA1:150 YARDS FROM ERIC CHULIM/SAORD/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY RESTITUTION TO THE VICTIM, TO BE MONITORED BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT, PLUS 15% ADMINISTRATIVE FEES/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANTS, JERELL HENDERSON (COURT #14004128) & JOHN  LACAP (COURT #14004132), ARE JOINTLY & SEVERALLY RESPONSIBLE FOR THE AMOUNT OF RESTITUTION IN THE SUM OF $1630,24; ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION FILED IN COURT,/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/
